description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, build, and merge, and a global variable BUILD_IMAGE set to "1". In the build stage add a build:image job that uses the docker:git image with a docker:dind service, runs only on pushes that change Dockerfile, .dockerignore, bin/* or config/*, and executes a multi‑line script that builds a TAGS variable "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" (adding ":latest" when on the default branch) and then runs ./bin/docker $TAGS. In the test stage add a shellcheck job that uses the koalaman/shellcheck-alpine image, runs only when files under bin/* change, excludes schedules, triggers, web and api, and runs the commands shellcheck bin/configure-ssh, shellcheck bin/docker, and shellcheck bin/merge-train. In the merge stage add two jobs: merge:foss uses the image ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest, runs only for API, schedules, triggers, or web when the variable MERGE_FOSS equals "1", caches the source and target directories with a key based on source/target project and branch, runs on a saas-linux-large-amd64 tag, has a timeout of 1 hour 10 minutes, retries once, sets SOURCE_PROJECT, TARGET_PROJECT, SSH_PRIVATE_KEY and SSH_PUBLIC_KEY variables, and runs bash /app/bin/merge-train foss; merge:security also uses ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest, caches source and target with a similar key, defines a resource group, retries twice, triggers when MERGE_SECURITY_MASTER or MERGE_SECURITY are true (always), stores LFS logs from source/.git/lfs/logs/ and target/.git/lfs/logs/ as artifacts on failure, sets SSH_PRIVATE_KEY and SSH_PUBLIC_KEY variables, and runs bash /app/bin/merge-train security.
